about.label: About
about.title: Strategic Technology & Engineering Leadership
about.subtitle: Bridging business vision with engineering scale to transform AI initiatives into robust production systems.
about.deck_desc: My focus is to align business and technology, define the right use cases, and move them into production with the right teams.
about.p1: For 20+ years, I have led large-scale platforms and engineering organizations across fintech, e-commerce, and digital ecosystems. I have built and led distributed teams of 50+ engineers, delivering cloud-native microservices that support millions of users.
about.p2: In recent years, I have led AI and LLM initiatives not as experiments, but as production systems that improve decisions and streamline operations.
about.p3: I work with business and executive stakeholders to identify high-impact opportunities and lead the full path from use case discovery to rollout.
about.p4: I combine technical depth with a pragmatic, results-focused approach to digital transformation.
about.principle_4: Pragmatic delivery from discovery to rollout

responsibleai.label: Responsible AI
responsibleai.title: Responsible & Production-Grade AI Framework
responsibleai.subtitle: Ensuring precision, compliance, data privacy, and human-in-the-loop oversight in enterprise AI systems.
responsibleai.project1_desc: Local LLM-based system for high-volume financial documents. On-premise architecture protected data privacy while reducing manual review time and operational overhead.
responsibleai.project2_desc: Fraud detection system using NLP and LLM to analyze transaction data and text signals. It identifies suspicious patterns in real time and scales across fintech, e-commerce, and telecom use cases.
responsibleai.p1_desc: No deployment without validated business impact. Every system is designed for real operational load.
responsibleai.p2_desc: Human oversight is the default for critical decisions. Automation expands gradually as trust increases.
responsibleai.p3_desc: On-premise architecture is used for financial and sensitive data. Data stays within the boundary, and compliance is handled in the architecture.
